svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="JxeQ0ZMm3kbF9P7UsUbz" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-824" dy="-269" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1120" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;" value="liebstoeckel — state handling" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="1480" x="60" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detect" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="window.__LIEBSTOECKEL_LIVE__
present? (server-injected)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="300" x="640" y="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detnote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="bootstrap = { ws, token, role, viewer }
absent ⇒ standalone" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="420" x="960" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sa" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=4;" value="STANDALONE — single .html, no server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="500" x="60" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="presW" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Presenter window
(#presenter)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="90" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="audW" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Audience window" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="340" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bc" edge="1" parent="1" source="presW" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;rounded=0;" target="audW" value="BroadcastChannel "liebstoeckel"
{ index, step, total, startedAt }"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="safallback" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="Plugins render their fallback (no shared state)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="400" x="110" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="live" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=3;" value="LIVE SESSION — bunx liebstoeckel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="480" width="940" x="600" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="presDev" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Presenter device
Deck or #presenter
role: presenter — CAN drive" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="630" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="viewDev" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Viewer devices ×N
read-only link / QR
role: viewer — follow + vote" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="210" x="630" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="srv" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=4;" value="Live Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="400" width="320" x="980" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hubLabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Yjs Hub — authoritative Y.Doc" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="290" x="995" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deckmap" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="deck map
index · step · total" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="135" x="995" y="328" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pollmap" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;" value="plugin:poll
options · votes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="135" x="1150" y="328" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sessions" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Sessions + tokens
presenter / viewer roles" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="290" x="995" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="srvplugins" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Server plugins
base64 manifest ⇒ ctx-injected" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="290" x="995" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="relaynote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=10;fontColor=#7a5300;" value="Relay: full state on join · broadcast each update to others · oversized/bad frames dropped" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="290" x="995" y="528" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ePres" edge="1" parent="1" source="presDev" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="srv" value="WebSocket (Yjs)
write index/step/total + votes
auto-reconnect (backoff)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eView" edge="1" parent="1" source="viewDev" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="srv" value="WebSocket (Yjs)
follow nav · cast vote"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eNo" edge="1" parent="1" source="detect" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="sa" value="No ⇒ standalone"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eYes" edge="1" parent="1" source="detect" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="live" value="Yes ⇒ live"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=3;" value="State → transport → authority" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="1480" x="60" y="730" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legendrows" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;spacingLeft=6;" value="• Slide index / step / total	—	live: Yjs "deck" map · standalone: BroadcastChannel	—	presenter writes, everyone reads

• Plugin shared state (poll votes, …)	—	Yjs "plugin:<id>" map (CRDT)	—	any participant writes, incl. read-only viewers; presenter-only actions gated in plugin code

• Brand (data-brand)	—	per-window React state	—	local to each window

• Elapsed timer	—	per-window React state	—	local to each presenter window

• Participant id	—	sessionStorage	—	local (1 browser session = 1 participant)

• Overlays: help / blur / overview / QR / jump	—	per-window React state	—	local UI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1444" x="78" y="768" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
• Slide index / step / total — live: Yjs "deck" map · standalone: BroadcastChannel — presenter writes, everyone reads
• Plugin shared state (poll votes, …) — Yjs "plugin:" map (CRDT) — any participant writes, incl. read-only viewers; presenter-only actions gated in plugin code
• Brand (data-brand) — per-window React state — local to each window
• Elapsed timer — per-window React state — local to each presenter window
• Participant id — sessionStorage — local (1 browser session = 1 participant)
• Overlays: help / blur / overview / QR / jump — per-window React state — local UI

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
